public_boundary: Use only public architecture, public docs, and public prototype claims. Do not include private memory data, private evolution prompts, undisclosed thresholds, API keys, or red-team payload dictionaries.
core_question: If an AI system should be accountable for what it says, what inspectable structures must exist inside the system?
claim_boundary: ToneSoul is a governance architecture and conceptual prototype.
Do not claim that ToneSoul proves AI consciousness, guarantees safety, or is production-ready.
Treat metaphor as metaphor unless a testable mechanism is shown.

public_concepts.name: TensionTensor
public_concepts.summary: Separates contextual weight, internal confidence, and resistance dimensions so disagreement remains inspectable.

public_concepts.name: Council deliberation
public_concepts.summary: Preserves distinct perspectives instead of collapsing disagreement into one final answer too early.

public_concepts.name: Memory integration
public_concepts.summary: Lets repeated tensions accumulate into accountable continuity rather than isolated reactions.

public_concepts.name: SelfCommit
public_concepts.summary: Turns commitments into reviewable semantic traces.
